items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks to remain behind slow traffic ('rester dans la file'). q0520's correct meaning is 'follow the vehicles in front' — meaning matches source option D.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: police may suspend licence if you lend car to someone whose licence was revoked. q0390 correctOption C matches that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks which vehicle ahead must not be overtaken; option A = 'police car on duty'. q0386 correct = police car on duty -> match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image + prompt ask allowed movements; q0746 correct = 'go straight or turn right'. Source option D = 'aller tout droit ou tourner à droite' corresponds to that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: at intersection without crosswalk with pedestrians, must slow/stop to yield. q0137 correct = reduce speed or stop to yield -> matches source option A.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Sign is triangular yellow with wheelchair — means 'watch for disabled people'. q0749 meaning 'watch for disabled people' matches source option A 'attention aux handicapés'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows oil-can-with-drip (engine oil warning). Machine top match q0611 indicates 'engine oil pressure too low', but source French options refer to 'pression d'essence'/'tuyau d'essence' (fuel) — option set does not contain the correct oil-related answer; localization/options conflict with image. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0611 is semantically appropriate for the image, but source options talk about fuel (essence) not oil; cannot map master correct option to any provided localized option.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Symbol is front windshield wiper; master q0603 correct meaning 'windshield wiper' — source option A ('l'essui-glace du pare-brise avant') matches that meaning.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular bicycle sign indicates bicycle/non-motorized vehicle lane/circulation; master q0845 meaning 'bicycle lane' corresponds to source option D ('circulation pour les véhicules non motorisés').

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Traffic-light prompt maps to master q0807 ('intersection warning'). Source option A ('le conducteur approche une intersection') matches that meaning; mapping is plausible though candidate scores vary.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Sign shows two opposite arrows in warning triangle = two-way traffic. Master q0656 meaning 'two-way traffic' maps to source option A ('circulation dans les deux sens').

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image = triangular yellow warning sign (intersection warning). q0710 corresponds to 'which kind of sign' with correct 'warning sign' → French 'panneau danger' (A). Top candidate q0764 is a different specific-intersection question, so approved q0710 instead. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0764 asks for specific intersection type, not the sign category; q0710 better matches 'kind of sign' question.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks how to drive when leaving highway — correct action is enter the deceleration/slower lane. q0469 correct = 'enter the deceleration lane'; French option with that meaning is B ('entrer dans une voie moins rapide').

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Road marking shows curved arrow with X → indicates U-turn prohibited. q0805 correctOptionText = 'no U-turn'. French option with that meaning is B ('interdit de faire demi-tour').
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows ETC/toll sign. q0772 correct = 'toll station with ETC'; French option meaning 'télépéage' is D, so map master correct to French D.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Correct behaviour encountering children = slow down and yield. q0178 correct = 'reduce speed and go slowly or stop to yield' which corresponds to French option B ('ralentir et céder le passage'). Top candidate list favored q0105 (vehicle-cut-in) but q0178 better matches 'children' context. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0105 concerns another scenario (vehicle cutting in); q0178 semantically matches encountering children and aligns with the French options.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a curve warning sign (no explicit speed-limit sign). Top candidate q0481 and others disagree on correct speed — option-set / image semantics mismatch. Needs human review or clearer image.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue rectangular directional sign with place names and km distances — matches q0758 ('location and distance'). Localized option A is 'le nom de la destination et la distance' — correct.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Question asks numeric safety distance for a warning triangle on a highway (entre 50 et 150 m). No clear existing qid in top candidates matches this exact regulatory-distance item — create new. Local answer B matches extracted correct.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows car parked near a gas station. q0419 identifies violation 'less than 30 m from gas station' and its correct option corresponds to localized option A. Top candidate match is strong.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks which light to use when moving to a slower (deceleration) lane — correct action is right-turn indicator. q0391 has correctOption = 'turn on the right-turn signal' which maps to localized option B.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangular warning sign with cow silhouette indicates livestock/animal caution. q0781 meaning 'watch for animals' is the best match; localized option D 'attention aux animaux domestiques' corresponds to livestock — selected. Some candidates interpret as 'wildlife' so moderate risk.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow rectangular '30' advisory sign matches q0876 (recommended speed). Master correct is 'recommended speed' — maps to French option A 'vitesse conseillée'.
